# orientation

**Instance Property**

A quaternion that describes the orientation of the speaker layout relative to the scene origin.

## Declaration

```swift
var orientation: simd_quatf { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value to the `orientation` initializer argument. See [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEAmbientMixerDefinition/init(channelLayout:orientation:)].

## Inspecting the Mixer

- **inputChannelLayout**: The channel layout of input audio.
